name: Localtunnel
description: Localtunnel — Open-source tool exposing localhost ports over HTTPS for webhook testing and external API callback development.

seo.title: Localtunnel — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Localtunnel: Localtunnel — Open-source tool exposing localhost ports over HTTPS for webhook testing and external API callback development.

when_to_use: Localhost webhook endpoint exposure for Stripe event testing
OAuth callback URL hosting for local auth flow development
Third-party API callback testing without cloud deployment
Temporary HTTPS endpoint for CI/CD integration testing
Demo environment exposure for stakeholder review sessions

pros: Trivial to expose localhost for webhook testing
review.verdict: Quick and dirty localhost tunnel; fine for testing, inappropriate for anything near production.
review.best_for: Devs testing webhooks and callbacks for a few minutes.
review.not_for: Long-running exposures or anything involving real secrets.
